design_philosophy: E1: Anti-AI Designer. We avoid clinical or cheap saas layouts. Instead, we use generous white space, very subtle decorative halos, elegant typography mixing a clean sans-serif with an italic editorial serif, and premium but accessible visual hierarchy. Tension is created by asymmetric whitespace and alternating soft pastel tones against a stark white canvas.

spacing_and_layout.general: Airy, modern, heavily utilizing white space. Containers should have padding between p-12 to p-24.
spacing_and_layout.borders: Cards must have a solid 1px or 2px border in #FEC4D2. No heavy drop shadows. Use subtle glows instead.
spacing_and_layout.radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-full for buttons and tags.
spacing_and_layout.decorations: Use absolute positioned blur-3xl divs with bg-[#FEC4D2] at 5-10% opacity as decorative halos behind key sections.

animations.scroll: Subtle fade-in and slide-up on scroll (using framer-motion).
animations.interactions: Buttons scale up slightly on hover. Cards border changes slightly, and wishlist icon appears on hover.
animations.ia_loader: Sequential loading animation with fading text/icons for the Virtual Try-On module.

components_strategy.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full), alternating between the Pink and Blue colors. Text color should maintain contrast.
components_strategy.cards_comparator: White background, #FEC4D2 border. Image at top, Name, Brand, Price, Stars, Ingredient tags. 'Voir le produit' button and a Wishlist heart icon appearing on hover.
components_strategy.podium: 3-column layout. The #1 spot must be elevated in the center. The bases/pedestals must alternate between #FEC4D2 and #79C1E0.
components_strategy.inputs: Shadcn based, rounded-lg or rounded-xl, light gray borders, focusing to #FEC4D2 or #79C1E0 ring.
components_strategy.ia_module: Drag & Drop zone with dashed border. A slider for budget. Results view is a 2-column layout: left side is the uploaded photo with absolute positioned interactive hotspots (framer-motion pulse), right side is a list of the used products.
components_strategy.badges: Small pill tags for ingredients or tags, pale background with dark text.

hero_portrait.description: Natural glowing makeup portrait for the hero section.

pages_structure.Header: Mega menu with 'Visage', 'Corps', 'Cosmétiques'. Dropdown showing 2 columns (Products vs Skin problems).
Homepage: Hero section: Bold H1 in #FEC4D2 (using Bodoni italic for emphasis keywords), CTA.
Highlighted Modules: Comparator preview and IA Virtual Try-On.
Top of the Month Podium: Ranked products #1, #2, #3.
IA Banner: Call to action for the try-on module.
Comparator_Page: Initial state: Popup asking for criteria.
Main layout: Left sidebar for real-time filters. Right side is a CSS Grid of product cards.
IA_TryOn_Module: Configuration view: Prompts selection (emojis: ✨🍊🌸💋🖤☀️💜) + free text input + Budget Slider.
Result view: 2 Columns. Left has the photo with floating interactive hotspots. Right has the breakdown of products applied.

data_testid_instructions: All interactive elements, inputs, buttons, and cards MUST have a kebab-case data-testid property (e.g., 'hero-cta-button', 'wishlist-toggle', 'budget-slider').
implementation_notes_for_main_agent: Ensure you install and configure Poppins and Bodoni Moda fonts from Google Fonts. Use lucide-react for standard icons. Emphasize spacing (padding and margins) over borders/backgrounds to maintain the airy premium feel. The H1 must be #FEC4D2, H2/H3 must be #79C1E0. Alternate CTA button colors. Cards must have the specific pink border (#FEC4D2). Remember the decorative halos with 5-10% opacity.
